prompt: Hyper-realistic product photography of a neon yellow-green (chartreuse, #D4FF00) athletic performance t-shirt, photographed in a floating ghost mannequin / invisible mannequin style (no model visible, no hanger) against a pure solid matte black background (#000000). Shirt displayed FRONT VIEW, upright and centered. Lightweight breathable dry-fit polyester fabric with subtle satin sheen and fine mesh texture. Athletic fit, short sleeves, crew neck collar. CRITICAL TEXT PLACEMENT: The shirt has its branding printed on the LEFT CHEST AREA (wearer's left, viewer's right-of-center is wrong — it is on viewer's LEFT side of the shirt). The text 'IMMFREE' is printed VERTICALLY ROTATED 90 DEGREES COUNTERCLOCKWISE, reading from BOTTOM to TOP, in bold condensed sans-serif black letters (like Oswald Bold or Bebas Neue). Directly NEXT TO the vertical IMMFREE text (to its right), the small text 'by Immunotec.' is also printed VERTICALLY rotated 90 degrees counterclockwise, in a thin minimalist sans-serif black font, at about 40% the size of IMMFREE. Both text elements are aligned vertically on the left chest of the shirt, reading bottom-to-top. The text is MATTE BLACK ink on the neon fabric, perfectly legible, crisp edges. No other print, no logo on center chest, no back print visible. Natural gravity drape, subtle fabric folds. Dramatic studio lighting from above-left creates soft highlights and gentle shadow. Ultra sharp focus on the vertical print. Premium editorial product photography, 8K detail, e-commerce hero shot. The neon chartreuse must GLOW against pure black background. No environment, no props, no people.
negative_prompt: horizontal text, IMMFREE written horizontally, center chest logo, text in the middle of shirt, person visible, model, human, face, hands, hanger visible, mannequin visible, wrinkled crumpled, dirty, white background, colored background, scene, room, floor, multiple shirts, back view, sideways shirt, shirt rotated, shirt lying flat, flat lay, cartoon, illustration, vector, oversaturated, blurry, low quality, watermark, additional text, serif font, script font, misspelled
